question.label: Next two weeks
question.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?
question.description: Closes by steering toward practical changes that reduce load without introducing new topics.

answer: If we reset scope now, the next month is sustainable.

assessment.note: Resetting scope now as the condition for a sustainable next month signals a practical path to improved load and clearer boundaries.

new_queue.label: Priority ranking
new_queue.name: If you had to cut your work in half tomorrow, what would you drop first — and what's non-negotiable?

issues: ref_alias q_next_two_weeks_15 not in remaining queue — treating as new

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
I want clearer ownership boundaries so I am not default escalation.
If we reset scope now, the next month is sustainable.
